examples: In short, team spirit and effective communication are conducive to employee and business performance alike.
Cutting the working week would be conducive to the individual, giving millions of workers more time to spend as they see fit.
In my view, it is important for parents to ensure that the home atmosphere is conducive to learning both academic and social skills.
Moderate noise allows us to enter a state of mind conducive to creative breakthroughs, the study found.
These are things countries are doing to make themselves more conducive to innovation in the future.
